name: Distance
summary: The Distance class contains methods for calculating the distance between geometric objects.

methods.name: PointToLine
methods.summary: Returns the distance between the given point and line.

methods.name: PointToLineSegment
methods.summary: Returns the distance between the given point and line segment.

methods.name: PointToPlane
methods.summary: Returns the distance between the given point and plane.

methods.name: PointToPoint
methods.summary: Returns the distance between the given two points.
